я.analysis: Pronoun. The first letter of the alphabet and the word for 'I'. ant. ты, он, она, etc.
я.synonym: моя персона, пишущий эти строки, автор этих строк

еду.analysis: Verb. Use this for bikes, cars, or buses. syn. иду (in some contexts).

иду.analysis: Verb. 1st person singular of идти; motion on foot.

в.analysis: Preposition. Indicates location or direction into.

магазин.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Fun fact: This is where the English word 'magazine' (a storehouse for info) comes from. syn. лавка.

на.analysis: Preposition. Used here to show you are 'on' the bicycle. ant. под.

велосипеде.analysis: Noun. The 'е' ending is the prepositional case marker.

мне.analysis: Pronoun (Dative). Literally: 'To me [there is] a need'. ant. тебе, ему, ей, etc.

нужна.analysis: Short adjective. It changes based on the gender of the thing you need. syn. необходима. ant. не нужна.

находится.analysis: Reflexive verb. Common for describing locations.

ближайшая.analysis: Superlative Adjective (Feminine). Root is 'близко' (near). The '-айшая' suffix is the 'super-mode' that makes it the *most* near. ant. самая дальняя.

аптека.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Cognate with 'apothecary.' In Russia, these are often green-lit crosses and are everywhere.

плохо.analysis: Adverb. Modifies how you perform an action (like speaking). syn. нехорошо. ant. хорошо.

по-русски.analysis: Adverb. The 'по-' prefix and '-и' suffix create the 'in the manner of' form for languages.

пожалуйста.analysis: Particle. The 'й' and 'ст' are often swallowed in fast speech—sounds like 'pa-ZHAL-sta'.
пожалуйста.synonym: будь так любезен, добро пожаловать, извольте

сколько.analysis: Question word. Use for both price and quantity.

стоит.analysis: Verb. 3rd Person Singular. Be careful: 'стои́т' means costs, 'сто́ит' means stands.
стоит.synonym: игра стоит свеч, достаточно, стоит только

этот.analysis: Demonstrative Pronoun. Masculine form to match 'билет'. ant. тот.

москву.analysis: Proper Noun. The '-у' ending is Accusative Case, showing direction of travel.

нужно.analysis: Adverbial/Impersonal. Unlike 'нужна', this neutral form is used for 'it is necessary [to do something]'. syn. надо. ant. не нужно.

вызвать.analysis: Perfective verb; to summon or cause.

врача.analysis: Noun, Masculine. The '-а' ending is Accusative here because you are 'calling' the doctor (direct object). syn. доктор.

как.analysis: Adverb/Conjunction. Used here in the set phrase 'как можно скорее'.

скорее.analysis: Comparative Adverb. Root: скоро (fast). syn. быстрее. ant. медленнее.

у.analysis: Preposition. Used with Genitive case to show ownership (At me there is...).

меня.synonym: моя персона, пишущий эти строки, автор этих строк

нет.analysis: Negation. In possession sentences, it triggers the Genitive case for the thing you don't have. ant. да, есть.
нет.synonym: только через мой труп, ни за какие коврижки, очень нужно

паспорта.analysis: Noun. Genitive singular form because of the negation 'нет'.

и.analysis: Conjunction. Simple connector. syn. а, да.

телефона.analysis: Noun. Genitive singular form because of 'нет'.

заказать.natural: To order; to place an order.
заказать.analysis: Perfective verb; to place an order or request.

чашку.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Accusative Case (ending in -у) as the direct object of 'заказать'.

горячего.analysis: Adjective, Masculine Genitive. Modifies 'кофе'. In Genitive, '-го' is pronounced like 'v' (ga-RYA-che-va). ant. холодного.

кофе.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Indeclinable—it never changes its spelling regardless of the case!

вы.analysis: Pronoun. Use this for strangers, bosses, or groups. Much safer than 'ты' for survival. ant. ты.

сейчас.analysis: Adverb. Literally 'this hour'. syn. теперь. ant. потом, тогда.

а.analysis: Conjunction. Used to contrast or connect clauses, similar to 'but' or 'and'. syn. но.

по.analysis: Preposition. Can mean 'along', 'according to', or indicate motion over a surface.

это.analysis: Pronoun/Particle. Can mean 'this is' or 'it is'.

из.analysis: Preposition. Means 'from' or 'out of'. ant. в.

то.analysis: Conjunction/Particle. Can mean 'then', 'in that case', or be used for emphasis.

свой.analysis: Possessive pronoun. Means 'one's own'. ant. чужой.

весь.analysis: Pronoun/Adjective. Means 'all' or 'whole'. syn. целый. ant. часть.

год.analysis: Noun, Masculine. A calendar year or a person's age (ему 10 лет).

для.analysis: Preposition. Marks purpose, recipient, or benefit.
для.synonym: ради, с целью, для того чтобы

ты.analysis: Pronoun. Second person singular, informal 'you'. ant. вы.

все.analysis: Pronoun/Adjective. Means 'all' or 'everyone'. ant. никто, ничто.
все.synonym: целиком, все без исключения, от мала до велика

мочь.analysis: Verb. Infinitive form of 'to be able'.

человек.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'person' or 'human being'. syn. личность.

еще.analysis: Adverb. Can mean 'still', 'yet', or 'more'. ant. уже.
еще.synonym: а еще, до сего времени, до сего часа

себя.analysis: Reflexive pronoun. Refers back to the subject, 'oneself'.

до.analysis: Preposition. Means 'until', 'before', or 'up to'. ant. после.

время.analysis: Noun, Neuter. Time in general or a particular period (в это время).

если.synonym: разве что, ежели, в случае если

когда.analysis: Adverb/Conjunction. Asks 'when' or introduces a time clause.

другой.analysis: Adjective/Pronoun. Means 'other' or 'another'. syn. иной. ant. этот же.

вот.analysis: Particle. Points out something or adds emphasis; often like 'here/there' or 'so'.

знать.analysis: Verb. Imperfective infinitive, 'to know'. ant. не знать.

при.analysis: Preposition. Can mean 'at', 'in the presence of', or 'attached to'.

чтобы.analysis: Conjunction. Introduces purpose or desired result.
чтобы.synonym: дабы, ради того чтобы, с тем чтобы

дело.analysis: Noun, Neuter. A matter/issue or an activity/business.

новый.analysis: Adjective. Means 'new'. syn. свежий. ant. старый.

рука.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Hand/arm; figuratively help or authority (в чьих-то руках).

во.analysis: Preposition variant used before certain consonants.

со.analysis: Preposition. Variant of 'с', used before certain consonant clusters.

раз.analysis: Noun, Masculine. One occurrence; also used for counting (раз, два, три).

ну.analysis: Particle/Interjection. Expresses encouragement, impatience, or hesitation.

после.synonym: по окончании, вслед за тем, за

работа.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'work' or 'job'. syn. труд. ant. отдых.

самый.analysis: Adjective/Pronoun. Used to form the superlative, 'the most'.

потом.analysis: Adverb. Means 'then' or 'afterwards'. syn. затем. ant. сначала.

надо.analysis: Predicate. Means 'it is necessary'. syn. нужно.

слово.natural: Word; also a promise or speech.

большой.analysis: Adjective. Means 'big' or 'large'. syn. огромный. ant. маленький.

должен.analysis: Predicate adjective. Means 'must' or 'have to'. syn. обязан.

место.analysis: Noun, Neuter. Location or a seat/space.

лицо.analysis: Noun, Neuter. Face/appearance; in official style: a person.

друг.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'friend'. syn. товарищ. ant. враг.

теперь.analysis: Adverb. Means 'now', as opposed to before. syn. сейчас.

глаз.analysis: Noun, Masculine. The eye; also figuratively attention/overview.

тоже.synonym: как и, также, в свою очередь

тогда.natural: Then; at that time; in that case.

да.analysis: Particle/Conjunction. Means 'yes' or can mean 'and'. ant. нет.

здесь.analysis: Adverb. Means 'here'. syn. тут. ant. там.
здесь.synonym: в этом месте, тут, на этом месте

дом.analysis: Noun, Masculine. A building or one's home/household.

потому.analysis: Adverb. Often part of 'потому что', meaning 'because'.

сторона.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Side or direction; also a party in a dispute.

мир.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'world' or 'peace'. ant. война.

случай.analysis: Noun, Masculine. A particular case/event; also chance.

голова.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Head; also 'mind/brain' in speech.

ребенок.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'child'. syn. дитя. ant. взрослый.

просто.synonym: с легкостью, попросту, и к бабке не ходи

сила.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'strength' or 'force'. ant. слабость.

конец.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'end'. syn. окончание. ant. начало.

перед.analysis: Preposition. Means 'in front of' or 'before'. ant. за, сзади.

несколько.analysis: Adverb. Means 'several' or 'a few'. ant. много.

между.analysis: Preposition. Indicates position between two or among several.

пойти.analysis: Perfective of идти; also used for 'to start' (пойти дождь).

город.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'city' or 'town'. ant. деревня.

дать.analysis: Verb. Perfective infinitive, 'to give'. ant. взять, получить.

также.analysis: Adverb. Means 'also' or 'as well'. syn. тоже.
также.synonym: кроме того, в свою очередь, к тому же

никто.analysis: Pronoun. Means 'nobody' or 'no one'. ant. все, каждый.

получить.analysis: Verb. Perfective infinitive, 'to get' or 'to receive'. ant. дать, отдать.

отношение.analysis: Noun, Neuter. Relation between things or attitude toward someone.

хотя.synonym: хоть, несмотря на то что, даже если

оказаться.natural: To turn out; to find oneself.

взять.analysis: Verb. Perfective infinitive, 'to take'. ant. дать, положить.

являться.natural: To be; to constitute; to appear (formal).

деньги.analysis: Noun, plural. Money in general; cash or funds.

почему.synonym: чего, по какой причине, какими судьбами

земля.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'earth' or 'land'. ant. небо.

общий.analysis: Adjective. Means 'common' or 'general'. ant. частный, индивидуальный.

машина.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Common word for a car; also a machine.

однако.synonym: тем не менее, впрочем, как бы то ни было

хорошо.analysis: Adverb. The standard way to say things are fine. syn. норм. ant. плохо.

отец.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'father'. syn. папа. ant. мать.

хороший.analysis: Adjective. Means 'good'. syn. добрый. ant. плохой.

час.analysis: Noun, Masculine. 60 minutes; also clock time (в час).

сегодня.synonym: сегодняшний день, на данный момент, сейчас

право.analysis: Noun, Neuter. Means 'right' or 'law'. ant. обязанность.

совсем.analysis: Adverb. Means 'completely' and with negation 'at all'.

главный.analysis: Adjective. Means 'main' or 'chief'. syn. основной. ant. второстепенный.

решение.analysis: Noun, Neuter. Means 'decision' or 'solution'. ant. проблема, задача.

увидеть.natural: To see; to catch sight of.

дверь.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Door; entry/exit in a building.

история.analysis: Noun, Feminine. History of events; also a story/episode.

лучший.analysis: Adjective. Superlative of 'хороший', means 'best'. ant. худший.

власть.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Power/authority; often refers to the government.

голос.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Voice/sound; in politics, a vote.

стоять.analysis: Verb. Imperfective infinitive, 'to stand'. ant. лежать, сидеть.
стоять.synonym: стоп, не двигаться!, ни шагу дальше!

вообще.synonym: в целом, по большому счету, по идее

больше.analysis: Adverb. Comparative of 'много', means 'more'. ant. меньше.

маленький.analysis: Adjective. Means 'small' or 'little'. syn. небольшой. ant. большой, огромный.

любой.synonym: всякий, тот или иной, тот или другой

никогда.synonym: ни в коем случае, отродясь, вовек

область.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'region' or 'area'. syn. сфера.

принять.natural: To accept; to take; to adopt.

настоящий.analysis: Adjective. Means 'real' or 'present'. syn. реальный. ant. поддельный.

всякий.analysis: Pronoun/Adjective. Means 'every' or 'any'. syn. каждый, любой.

пока.synonym: поколе, прощевай, до тех пор пока

свет.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'light' or 'world'. ant. тьма, темнота.

пора.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'time' or 'it's time to'.

путь.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Means 'way' or 'path'. syn. дорога.

разный.analysis: Adjective. Means 'different' or 'various'. syn. различный. ant. одинаковый.

нужный.analysis: Adjective. Means 'necessary' or 'needed'. syn. необходимый. ant. ненужный.

находиться.natural: To be located; to be situated.
находиться.analysis: Imperfective reflexive verb; used for location.

собственный.analysis: Adjective. Means 'own'. syn. свой. ant. чужой.

мать.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'mother'. syn. мама. ant. отец.

мама.analysis: Noun, Feminine. Means 'mom' or 'mother'. syn. мать.

нельзя.analysis: Predicate. Means 'it is not allowed' or 'one cannot'. ant. можно.

здравствуйте.analysis: Interjection. Formal greeting, means "hello". ant. до свидания.

здрасьте.analysis: Colloquial contraction of 'Здравствуйте'. Common in fast, everyday speech.

чё.analysis: Informal/slang version of 'что'. Used heavily in casual spoken Russian.

норм.analysis: Adverbial clipping of 'нормально'. The universal neutral response. ant. плохо.

медведь.analysis: Noun, Masculine. Refers to a large forest animal.

завтрак.analysis: Noun, Masculine. The first meal of the day. ant. ужин.

обед.analysis: The main meal of the day in Russia, usually eaten between 1 PM and 3 PM.

ужин.analysis: The final meal of the day.

вкусно.analysis: Essential for being a polite guest. Use it after eating.

счёт.analysis: Used at restaurants. 'Счёт, пожалуйста' is the magic phrase.

направо.analysis: Directional adverb. Don't confuse it with 'прямо'.

налево.analysis: Directional adverb. Also used in the idiom 'ходить налево' (to cheat), so watch the context!

прямо.analysis: Used for directions and also to mean 'honestly' or 'frankly'.

карта.analysis: Context is key. Most likely refers to your payment card in a shop.

метро.analysis: The lifeblood of major Russian cities. Invariable noun (it doesn't change endings).

остановка.analysis: Where you wait for public transport. Also means a 'pause' in general.

завтра.analysis: Adverb/Noun. Refers to the day after today.

извините.analysis: Polite form. Use this to get someone's attention or apologize for a bump.

можно.analysis: Impersonal word. Indicates permission or possibility. ant. нельзя.

круто.analysis: Slang that became standard. Use it to react positively to anything.

давай.natural: Let's go / Come on / OK / Bye.
давай.analysis: The ultimate Swiss Army knife word. Often said at the end of a phone call to mean 'Bye'.

зарядка.analysis: Dual meaning: it's either your phone cable or your 5-minute morning workout.

пакет.analysis: You will be asked if you need one every single time you go to the store.

пиво.analysis: A popular alcoholic beverage in Russia. Often enjoyed with friends or at meals.

идите.analysis: The formal/plural imperative of 'идти'. Use this when giving directions to a stranger or a group.

следовать.natural: To follow; to be supposed to.

прийтись.natural: To have to; to be suitable.

давно.natural: Long ago; for a long time.

заниматься.natural: To be engaged in; to do regularly.

отвечать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To give an answer or respond.

точка.analysis: Noun, feminine. A point or dot; also a period.

основа.analysis: Noun, feminine. The base or underlying basis.

вполне.analysis: Adverb. 'Quite/fully' as in enough or completely.

далее.analysis: Adverb. Indicates continuation or next step.

рассказывать.natural: To tell; to narrate; to recount.
рассказывать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To narrate or tell a story.

представлять.natural: To represent; to present; to imagine.
представлять.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To represent/present or imagine.

рассказать.analysis: Verb, perfective. To tell/recount to completion.

мнение.analysis: Noun, neuter. A personal opinion or view.

документ.analysis: Noun, masculine. An official written paper.

институт.analysis: Noun, masculine. Educational or social institution.

ход.analysis: Noun, masculine. Movement, course, or a turn.

брать.natural: To take; to grab; to borrow.

проект.analysis: Noun, masculine. Planned work or proposal.

провести.natural: To conduct; to carry out; to spend (time).
провести.analysis: Verb, perfective. To carry out or spend.

срок.analysis: Noun, masculine. A time span or deadline.

крупный.analysis: Adjective. Large in size or importance.

вспомнить.analysis: Verb, perfective. To recall from memory.

просить.natural: To ask; to request; to beg.

открыть.natural: To open; to uncover; to discover.

привести.natural: To bring; to lead; to put in order.
привести.analysis: Verb, perfective. To bring/lead or restore order.

очередь.analysis: Noun, feminine. Line of people; one's turn.

оставить.natural: To leave; to abandon; to keep.
оставить.analysis: Verb, perfective. To leave/abandon or keep behind.

принимать.natural: To accept; to take; to admit; to host.
принимать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To accept/take or receive guests.

спрашивать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To ask a question.

близкий.analysis: Adjective. Close in distance or relationship.

создание.analysis: Noun, neuter. Act of creating or a created being.

назвать.analysis: Verb, perfective. To give a name.

период.analysis: Noun, masculine. A span of time.

шаг.analysis: Noun, masculine. A step or action.

успеть.natural: To manage (in time); to be in time.
успеть.analysis: Verb, perfective. To make it in time.

выходить.natural: To go out; to exit; to come out.

предложить.analysis: Verb, perfective. To make an offer/proposal.

попасть.natural: To get (into); to end up; to hit.
попасть.analysis: Verb, perfective. To get in/into or hit.

тип.analysis: Noun, masculine. Type or kind; colloq. guy.

собираться.natural: To gather; to get ready; to intend.
собираться.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To gather or intend.

относиться.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To relate/pertain or treat.

использование.analysis: Noun, neuter. The act of using.

кстати.analysis: Parenthetical adverb. Adds a side note.

подойти.natural: To come up; to approach; to fit/suit.
подойти.analysis: Verb, perfective. To approach or be suitable.

удаться.natural: To succeed; to turn out well.

герой.analysis: Noun, masculine. A hero or main character.

широкий.analysis: Adjective. Wide in space or scope.

церковь.analysis: Noun, feminine. Church building or institution.

сесть.natural: To sit down; to take a seat.

приходиться.natural: To have to; to fall to one's share.

проходить.natural: To pass; to go through; to take place.
проходить.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To pass/go through or occur.

составлять.natural: To составлять; to make up; to compose.

союз.analysis: Noun, masculine. Union/alliance; also grammar conjunction.

установить.natural: To установить; to establish; to install.
установить.analysis: Verb, perfective. To establish or install.

стараться.natural: To try; to make an effort.

уметь.natural: To know how; to be able.

встать.natural: To stand up; to get up.

дерево.analysis: Noun, neuter. A tree; also wood.

однажды.analysis: Adverb. Refers to a single time in the past or future.

природа.analysis: Noun, feminine. Nature or natural character.

общественный.analysis: Adjective. Related to society or public life.

проводить.natural: To conduct; to carry out; to see off.
проводить.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To carry out or spend time; also see off.

угол.analysis: Noun, masculine. A corner or angle.

бросить.analysis: Verb, perfective. To throw/drop or abandon.

скоро.analysis: Adverb. In the near future or quickly.

род.analysis: Noun, masculine. Lineage or kind; grammatical gender.

специалист.analysis: Noun, masculine. Expert in a field.

низкий.analysis: Adjective. Low in height or level.

снять.natural: To remove; to take off; to rent; to film.
снять.analysis: Verb, perfective. To remove/take off; also rent or film.

позволить.natural: To allow; to permit; to let.

связать.natural: To tie; to connect; to bind.
связать.analysis: Verb, perfective. To tie or connect.

входить.natural: To enter; to go in; to be included.
входить.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To enter or be included.

поехать.natural: To go by vehicle (once); to set off.
поехать.analysis: Verb, perfective. To start going by transport.

роман.analysis: Noun, masculine. Novel or romantic relationship.

господин.analysis: Noun, masculine. Polite address to a man.

касаться.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To touch or concern.

оказываться.natural: To turn out; to end up; to be located.
оказываться.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To turn out or be found.

действовать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To act or be in effect.

отметить.natural: To note; to mark; to celebrate.
отметить.analysis: Verb, perfective. To note/mark or celebrate.

предмет.analysis: Noun, masculine. Object/item; also school subject.

сон.analysis: Noun, masculine. Sleep or a dream.

ребята.analysis: Plural noun. Informal for young people.

остановиться.natural: To stop; to come to a halt.
остановиться.analysis: Verb, perfective. To stop moving or cease.

темный.analysis: Adjective. Dark in color or light.

вовсе.analysis: Adverb/particle. Emphasis of negation or degree.

молчать.natural: To be silent; to keep quiet.

линия.analysis: Noun, feminine. Line or row; also lineage.

волос.analysis: Noun, masculine. Single hair; plural for hair.

вызывать.natural: To call; to summon; to cause.
вызывать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To cause or call.

председатель.analysis: Noun, masculine. Chairperson/head of a meeting.

никак.natural: In no way; not at all.

служить.natural: To serve; to be in service.

состоять.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To consist or be a member.

выступать.analysis: Verb, imperfective. To perform or speak.

ставить.natural: To put; to place; to set.

подняться.analysis: Verb. Infinitive form, means 'to rise up'.

подходить.analysis: Verb. Infinitive form, means 'to fit in'.

построить.analysis: Verb. Infinitive form, means 'to build up'.
